title: Set up Cloudinary for image and video management in Next.js
summary: Install next-cloudinary, configure credentials, use CldImage for optimized delivery, CldUploadWidget for client uploads, and apply on-the-fly transformations.
declaration: I will integrate Cloudinary into this Next.js project using the next-cloudinary package. This gives you optimized image/video delivery via CDN, automatic format selection (WebP/AVIF), resizing, cropping, and a drag-and-drop upload widget. If you prefer UploadThing or S3/R2 instead, say so before I begin.
